beginning.embedded_functions:
/** * Return: * - 0: ok * - 1: invalid * - 2: NULL */ static inline int em_check_http2_fuzzing(const char *str) { // ... } </embedded_functions>
<property value="THEN" delay_units="ms" delay_min="0" delay_max="10" property_id="100" type_property="ATTACK" description="5G Http2 fuzzing Payload Recognition"> <event event_id="1" value="COMPUTE" description="Nothing" boolean_expression=" true"/> <event event_id="2" value="COMPUTE" description="HTTP2 fuzzing" boolean_expression="( (( http2.header_method == 131) && #em_check_http2_fuzzing(http2.p_payload,meta.packet_index) ) && (ip.src != ip.dst))"/> </property> </beginning>
